name: Nexatel
description: Nexatel is a multi-vertical engineering and technology group with deep roots in Kerala and operations across Kuwait. We design, deploy and maintain mission-critical infrastructure for telecom, IT, structured cabling and clean-energy installations.
shortDescription: Multi-vertical engineering & technology group serving Kerala and Kuwait.
